title: Arts & Crafts Workshop
description: Creative crafts session including crochet, stitching, floral arrangements and calligraphy at Jurong West.

title: Cognitive Stimulation & Brain Fitness
description: Mind-stimulating activities incorporating health education, exercise and brain-alertness games for Jurong West seniors.

title: Health Screening & Wellness Check
description: Regular health screening for seniors including blood pressure, blood glucose and BMI checks at REACH Jurong West.

title: Communal Dining & Social Hour
description: Communal dining experience for seniors at Jurong West. Enjoy a meal together and bond with peers over food and conversation.

title: Hanyu Pinyin & Basic English Class
description: Language enrichment programme for seniors covering Hanyu Pinyin and basic English. Part of REACH's lifelong learning initiative at Jurong West.

title: Morning Exercise & Active Ageing Workout
description: Guided morning exercise session for seniors at SAGE Jurong East. Promotes physical fitness, balance and strength for active ageing.

title: Expressive Therapeutic Activities
description: Six-week group therapy programme for 8-12 seniors using art and music to express emotions, build inner resources and strengthen social bonds.

title: Guided Autobiography for Seniors (GAB)
description: Life story writing and sharing programme where seniors document their memories through guided autobiography sessions. A journey of self-discovery and celebration.

title: Art & Music Wellness Programme
description: Art and music programme that encourages and empowers seniors to lead meaningful and fulfilling lives through creative expression.

title: Mental Health Awareness Talk (CREST)
description: Public education talk by SAGE's Community Outreach Team (CREST) to raise mental health awareness and build emotional resilience among seniors.

title: Health Screening & Befriending
description: Regular health screening including blood pressure and vital signs checks, combined with befriending visits for isolated seniors at Jurong East.

title: Morning Exercise & Fitness
description: Guided morning exercise session for seniors at SASCO Kim Tian. Promotes physical fitness and active ageing in a supportive community environment.

title: Social & Recreational Activities
description: Recreational activities including karaoke, board games and group activities for seniors to socialise and stay engaged at SASCO Kim Tian.

title: Therapeutic Care & Rehabilitation
description: Professional therapeutic care and community rehabilitation programme for frail seniors. Combines medical support with social engagement at SASCO Kim Tian.

title: Buddying & Befriending Programme
description: Volunteer-led befriending programme pairing buddies with isolated seniors for regular home visits, social support and companionship.

title: Arts & Crafts Workshop
description: Creative arts and crafts session for seniors at SASCO Kim Tian. Express creativity through painting, handicrafts and collaborative art projects.

title: Health Screening & Monitoring
description: Regular health screening and monitoring for seniors including blood pressure, blood glucose and vital signs checks at SASCO Kim Tian.

title: Morning Exercise & Active Ageing Workout
description: Guided morning exercise session for Punggol seniors. Promotes physical fitness, balance and strength through fun group workouts.

title: Karaoke & Social Session
description: Weekly karaoke and social session for seniors at Punggol. Enjoy singing and bonding with fellow members in a lively community setting.

title: Arts & Crafts Workshop
description: Creative arts and crafts workshop for Punggol seniors. Explore painting, handicrafts and creative projects while socialising with peers.

title: Digital Literacy Workshop
description: Hands-on digital literacy workshop teaching Punggol seniors to use smartphones, messaging apps and online services safely.

title: Health Talk & Screening
description: Health awareness talks and regular health screenings for Punggol seniors. Covers topics like chronic disease management and preventive care.

title: Intergenerational Bonding Programme
description: Intergenerational bonding sessions with student volunteers from nearby schools. Includes performances, social activities and shared learning experiences.

title: Morning Exercise & Active Ageing Workout
description: Guided morning exercise session for Sengkang seniors. Fun group workout promoting balance, flexibility and active ageing.

title: Karaoke & Social Session
description: Weekly karaoke and social session for Sengkang seniors. Enjoy singing and socialising with peers in a friendly environment.

title: Arts & Crafts Workshop
description: Creative arts and crafts workshop for Sengkang seniors. Explore various creative projects while building friendships.

title: Health Monitoring & Befriending
description: Regular health monitoring including vital signs checks, combined with befriending visits for isolated seniors at Sengkang.

title: Intergenerational Bonding Programme
description: Intergenerational bonding with student volunteers from nearby schools. Performances, games and social activities bridging generations.

title: Digital Literacy Workshop
description: Hands-on digital literacy workshop for Sengkang seniors. Learn smartphone skills, online banking safety and messaging apps.

description: IMDA-partnered digital wellness programme covering smartphone mastery, mobile apps, e-payments, cybersecurity awareness and safe online practices for seniors.

title: Bingo & Social Games Afternoon
description: Lively afternoon of bingo, Rummy-O, chess and other social games promoting cognitive stimulation and community bonding among seniors.

title: Yoga for Seniors
description: Gentle chair and mat yoga session designed for seniors, focusing on flexibility, breathing techniques, balance and relaxation.

title: Healthy Eating Workshop
description: Nutrition education workshop where seniors learn about balanced diets, healthy cooking methods and meal planning for common health conditions.

title: Zumba Gold Fitness
description: Fun, low-impact Zumba Gold fitness class adapted for active seniors, combining Latin dance moves with easy-to-follow choreography for cardiovascular health.

title: Angklung Clan Music Session
description: Learn and perform traditional angklung music in this popular interest group. Seniors master the bamboo instrument while building ensemble skills and friendships.

title: Acrylic Painting Workshop
description: Guided acrylic painting class where seniors explore colour mixing, composition and creative expression on canvas, building an art portfolio over the term.

title: Health Screening & Wellness Check
description: Comprehensive health screening conducted near seniors' residences, including blood pressure, blood glucose, BMI and basic health assessment.

title: Digital Wellness Workshop

title: Bingo & Social Games Afternoon

title: Yoga for Seniors
description: Gentle chair and mat yoga session designed for seniors, focusing on flexibility, breathing techniques, balance and relaxation.

title: Healthy Eating Workshop
description: Nutrition education workshop where seniors learn about balanced diets, healthy cooking methods and meal planning for common health conditions.

title: SCOPE Diabetes Management Programme
description: Weekly community participation programme for residents aged 55+ with diabetes. Interactive workshops covering diet, exercise, medication and 12 aspects of holistic diabetes self-care.

title: Guided Autobiography (GAB) Group
description: Semi-structured life review programme developed by Dr James E. Birren using reminiscence and narrative therapy. Seniors reflect on life themes to find meaning and build social connections.

title: ComSA Club Activities
description: Peer-led interest group sessions at ComSA Whampoa including dancing, singing, sports and craftwork. Activities are planned and facilitated by trained ComSA Champions.

title: Curating Whampoa Heritage Walk
description: Community heritage programme where seniors document and share Whampoa's cultural history through photography, storytelling and neighbourhood walks as part of the Curating Whampoa project.

title: Cafe Kawan Cooking Session
description: Social cooking programme at Cafe Kawan where seniors take turns sharing family recipes, preparing dishes together and enjoying meals as a community.

title: Community Gardening
description: Hands-on gardening session at the community garden where seniors grow herbs and vegetables, learning sustainable practices and enjoying therapeutic outdoor activity.

title: Craftwork & Beading Workshop
description: Creative arts session where seniors learn beading, craft techniques and decorative art, building fine motor skills while socialising with peers.

title: SWING Community Action Group
description: 8-week programme where seniors identify local community issues and plan collective actions to improve age-friendly housing and neighbourhood environments in Whampoa.

title: CALM 1.0 — Combat Age-Related Loss of Muscle
description: An 8-week Sport Singapore x AIC programme introducing foundational resistance exercises using bands and free weights to prevent age-related muscle loss. Seniors aged 60+ learn seven core strength movements with trained coaches. Part of the national Fitness & Participation Programme. $30 per participant (ActiveSG credits accepted).

title: CALM 2.0 — Strength Training Progression
description: The 6-week follow-up to CALM 1.0 by Sport Singapore x AIC. Seniors progress to gym machine-based strength training with personalised coaching. Builds on resistance band foundations to improve muscle strength and functional independence. For graduates of CALM 1.0. $30 per participant.

title: Adaptive Sports — Boccia, Disc Golf & Sport Stacking
description: Weekly adaptive sports sessions led by SportCares-trained facilitators. Seniors enjoy modified sports including boccia, disc golf, ladder toss, sport stacking and seated floorball. Equipment provided by Sport Singapore. Suitable for all abilities. Part of the national drive to equip all AACs with adaptive sports by end 2026. Free for AAC members.

title: Seniors Go Digital — Smartphone Basics Workshop
description: Free hands-on digital skills workshop by IMDA's SG Digital Office. Digital Ambassadors guide seniors through smartphone basics — setting up WhatsApp, using transport apps (Grab, bus apps), mobile banking (POSB/DBS), scanning QR codes, and staying safe online. Bring your own smartphone. Walk-ins welcome.

title: Seniors Go Digital — Online Safety & Scam Prevention
description: IMDA digital safety workshop teaching seniors to recognise and avoid online scams, phishing attempts and fake news. Learn to verify information, secure your devices, and protect personal data. Conducted by trained Digital Ambassadors. Free for all seniors.

title: National Steps Challenge — Weekly Walking Group
description: Weekly group walk organised as part of HPB's National Steps Challenge. Seniors walk together around the neighbourhood guided by volunteers. title: Community Health Post — Weekly Health Monitoring
description: Enhanced Community Health Post by NHG Health at Woodlands AACs. Free weekly health checks including blood pressure monitoring, blood glucose testing, BMI measurement and fall-risk assessment. Open to walk-in residents. Nurses available for health advice and referrals. Part of the Age Well SG initiative.

title: Screen for Life — Health Screening Awareness Talk
description: Free health talk by HPB on the national Screen for Life programme. Learn about subsidised health screenings available for chronic diseases and cancers. Pioneer Generation: $0, Merdeka Generation/CHAS: $2, all other eligible Singaporeans: $5. Staff will help seniors check eligibility and book appointments via HealthHub.

title: DBS Foundation — Nutritious Meals & Social Activities
description: DBS Foundation's community initiative providing twice-weekly nutritious meals for vulnerable seniors. Each session includes communal dining, social games and activities with DBS staff volunteers. Part of DBS Foundation's $7.3 million programme reaching 6,000 seniors across 12 ageing towns.

title: DBS Foundation x IMDA — GenAI Literacy for Seniors
description: Free workshop series by DBS Foundation in collaboration with IMDA introducing seniors to Generative AI in a safe, hands-on way. Learn what AI chatbots are, how to use them for everyday tasks, and how to spot AI-generated misinformation. No prior tech experience needed. Tablets provided.

title: Singtel Digital Silvers — Smartphone Workshop
description: One-on-one smartphone coaching by Singtel staff volunteers. Seniors learn voice messaging, transport apps, e-banking, video calling, and online safety. Sessions available in English, Mandarin, Malay and Tamil. Part of Singtel's Digital Silvers programme empowering 7,000+ seniors with digital skills.

title: Hari Raya Aidilfitri Celebration
description: Festive Hari Raya celebration for seniors! Enjoy traditional Malay kueh and dishes, cultural performances, henna art, and ketupat-weaving activities. Seniors from all backgrounds come together to celebrate in the spirit of kampung togetherness. Traditional dress (baju kurung/baju melayu) encouraged.

Seniors from all backgrounds come together to celebrate in the spirit of kampung togetherness. Traditional dress (baju kurung/baju melayu) encouraged.

title: Qingming Festival — Remembrance & Wellness
description: A reflective session around Qingming (Tomb Sweeping) Festival. Seniors share stories and memories, learn about traditional customs, and participate in a guided mindfulness session on grief and remembrance. Light refreshments provided. Open to all.
venueAddress: Blk 409 Ang Mo Kio Ave 10 #01-843, Singapore 560409

title: World Health Day — Free Health Check & Talk
description: World Health Day 2026 special event at AACs. Free health checks (blood pressure, glucose, BMI), falls risk assessment, and a health talk on 'Healthy Ageing: Staying Active After 60'. In partnership with HPB and local healthcare clusters. Walk-ins welcome.

title: NLB Library Learning Journey — Digital Skills for Seniors
description: Free monthly NLB digital literacy programme for seniors. Learn to use NLB's eResources — borrow e-books, read newspapers (PressReader), use the NLB Mobile app, and discover online learning resources. Guided by NLB Digital Ambassadors. Part of NLB's Time of Your Life series for seniors aged 50+.

title: NLB Golden Circle Book Club — Kopi & Reads
description: Monthly book club for seniors by NLB. Discuss a selected book over kopi and snacks. Books are chosen by members and span fiction, non-fiction, memoirs and local history. A relaxed, social space for lifelong learners. English and Mandarin discussions available. Free.

title: PA Active Ageing — Line Dancing Interest Group
description: Weekly line dancing session organised by the People's Association Senior Citizens' Executive Committee (SCEC). Learn popular line dance routines in a fun, social group setting. No dance experience needed. Great for fitness, balance and making new friends. Free for residents.

title: SG60 — Life Unstoppable Seniors Carnival
description: SG60 celebration at AACs organised by AIC's Age Well SG initiative. Enjoy pickleball and virtual bike challenges, volunteer sign-up booths, free performances, and workshops. Rediscover play, purpose and passion as Singapore turns 60! Prizes to be won. Open to all seniors aged 50+.

title: Healthier SG — Enrolment & Information Session
description: Free Healthier SG outreach session. Learn about the national Healthier SG programme and how to enrol with a family doctor. Staff will help seniors check eligibility, understand subsidised health screenings (Screen for Life), and sign up on the spot via Singpass. Bring your NRIC and smartphone.

title: Age Well SG — Community Dining & Befriending
description: Daily communal dining programme under the Age Well SG initiative. Seniors enjoy a nutritious meal together and connect with befrienders and volunteers. For seniors living alone or with limited social networks. Referrals for care services available. Part of AAC's ABC (Active ageing, Befriending, Care) model.

title: Easter Celebration — Egg Painting & Fellowship

title: March Holidays — Grandparents & Grandchildren Fun Day
description: Intergenerational bonding activities during the March school holidays. Grandparents and grandchildren enjoy traditional games (five stones, chapteh, pick-up sticks), storytelling, and simple cooking together. Strengthen family bonds across generations. Free, but registration required.

title: Senior National Games 2026 — Practice & Team Selection
description: Weekly practice sessions preparing AAC teams for the Senior National Games 2026. Seniors train in five adaptive sports: boccia, disc golf, ladder toss, seated floorball and sport stacking. Build skills, teamwork and competitive spirit! Top performers represent their AAC at Zonal Heats. Open to all seniors aged 50+.

title: HPB Healthy Eating — Nutrition Workshop for Seniors
description: Monthly nutrition workshop by HPB covering healthy eating for seniors. Topics include reading food labels, cooking nutritious meals on a budget, managing diabetes through diet, and understanding the Healthy Plate model. Includes cooking demonstration and tasting. Free.

title: Dementia-Friendly Community — Awareness & Support
description: Monthly session by AIC's Dementia-Friendly Community initiative. Includes dementia awareness talk for caregivers, cognitive stimulation activities for persons with dementia, and a support group for families. Learn to recognise early signs and where to seek help. Free and open to the public.

title: GymTonic — Senior Strength Training on Hydraulic Machines
description: NTUC Health's signature GymTonic programme using Lien Foundation's software-enabled, senior-friendly hydraulic gym machines. Seniors follow a customised 30-minute strength training regime twice weekly. Visible physical transformation in about 3 months. Available at 30 sites with 2,300+ active participants. Suitable for seniors aged 50+.

description: High-energy K-Pop dance class with senior-friendly choreography led by qualified dance instructors at NTUC Health AACs. Learn popular K-Pop moves adapted for all fitness levels. Great cardio workout with a fun twist! No experience needed.

title: Nintendo Switch Gaming — Sports & Taiko Drumming
description: Fun gaming sessions with Nintendo Switch Sports and Taiko no Tatsujin at NTUC Health AACs. Seniors enjoy virtual bowling, tennis, and rhythm drumming games. Great for hand-eye coordination, reaction time and social bonding. All equipment provided.
